topic: revive closed PRs 31/34/32 via parallel worktree agents
decision: 3 background agents, one per branch in its own git worktree
sync: git merge origin/main (no force-push, per guardrail + operator choice)
ci: local DoD gates (lint/typecheck/test/format:check/build, +e2e for UI/server) — no PR-triggered CI exists, only publish-images.yml on main
outcome: each agent addresses Copilot comments, merges main last, pushes, opens NEW PR against main
